metadata.title: Request a Quote | elReda Advertising
metadata.description: Request a structured project quote from elReda Advertising for branding, websites, e-commerce, marketing, ERP, printing, mobile apps, and AI automation.

hero.title: Share the project shape before the first call
hero.description: A structured brief helps us understand the service mix, budget, timeline, and decision path before we recommend the right next step.
hero.note: Submit the essentials now. Security checks protect the form, while file exchange and email follow-up are handled manually during launch.

form.title: Project brief foundation
form.description: Use this structure to collect the minimum details needed for a useful quote conversation.
form.servicesLegend: What services are you looking for?

branding.label: Branding & identity
branding.description: Logo, identity system, brand guidelines, and launch materials.

web.label: Website development
web.description: Business websites, landing pages, and custom web experiences.

ecommerce.label: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: Online stores, payment setup, product structure, and conversion pages.

erp.label: Business systems / ERP
erp.description: CRM, inventory, dashboards, portals, and operational systems.

ai.label: AI automation
ai.description: Chatbots, workflow automation, integrations, and reporting assistants.

printing.label: Printing and production
printing.description: Print-ready collateral, packaging, signage, and production coordination.

cta.title: Prefer to talk before writing the brief?
cta.subtitle: Send a shorter message through the contact page and we will help you decide what belongs in the quote.
